name_en: Milk White 25B New 🆕 Accordion Bag 🚩🚩🚩 Sparkling Rhinestones 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Mimi Accordion Bag CHANEL Rhinestone Handle Accordion Bag 🎹 Dual-tone crystal handle is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art. The double-layer accordion style has a large capacity and can hold 2 phones 📱, a very practical bag 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and lovely~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! It can make you look refined with any outfit. 4831 Dimensions: 11*18.5*6cm/
